topic: Inner Circle Trader (ICT) — smart money concepts, entry/exit strategies
core_concepts: Liquidity Pool — buy-side (below lows), sell-side (above highs)
Order Block — last leg before strong move (demand/supply)
Fair Value Gap (FVG) — three-candle imbalance, price returns to fill
Optimal Trade Entry (OTE) — 62%-79% Fibonacci retracement of impulse
entry_rules: Wait for liquidity sweep that takes out stops
Enter at OTE (62%-79% retracement) with confluence (FVG, support/resistance)
Place SL just beyond the sweep level
Target next liquidity pool or 1:2+ reward-to-risk
exit_rules: FVG fill or time-based exit (kill zone transition)
fallback_strategies: If entry fails, wait for rejection candle at OTE (alternative trigger)
During low volatility, wait for COT extreme readings
If price stalls at OTE, use trailing stops

model_fallback.usage: Use for trend analysis, COT interpretation, risk calculations
